programme.title: BKFC 31: Richman vs. Doolittle
programme.desc: Features Mike Richman vs. Isaac Doolittle, Jake Lindsey vs. Brandon Girtz, plus Chris Camozzi vs. Bubba McDaniel in bare knuckle boxing action from Broomfield, Colo. From Oct. 15, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 38
programme.desc: April 21, 2023. Features Dat Nguyen vs. Daniel Straus, plus Jake Bostwick vs. Isaac Doolittle in bare-knuckle boxing action from Delray Beach, Florida.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: From Red Owl Boxing Arena in Houston.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bantamweight World Grand Prix continues as Raufeon Stots takes on Danny Sabatello and Patchy Mix meets Magomed Magomedov in the semifinals. Plus, Liz Carmouche defends her flyweight title against Juliana Velasquez. From Dec. 9, 2022.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrik Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrik Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Daniel Negreanu drags the pot with a wheel in Stand-Up, but a rough run of cards put him at a disadvantage; Phil Hellmuth can't get paid off by Eric Hicks on the river after hitting another big hand.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with teams of male and female fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Jozette Cotton vs. Miranda Barber, championship. From Oct. 16, 2022 at O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Linton Vassell vs. Valentin Moldavsky.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Mads Burnell defeats Clay Collard.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Brendan Loughnane defeats Justin Gonzales.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: From Feb. 21, 2025 at Melrose Ballroom in Queens, N.Y.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Wrestling legend and ESPN veteran Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders. Breaking news, hot takes, exclusive interviews and daily Best bets combine for must-watch sports entertainment.

programme.title: BYB 24: Super Brawl Saturday
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion DJ "Da Protégé" Linderman defends his title against undefeated challenger "Hurricane" Ike Villanueva; Harold "Lightning" McQueen takes on Brandon "Slaughterhouse" Birr in a featherweight championship rematch; from Biloxi, Miss.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Features Tony Nelson vs. Jose Liera in a bare knuckle boxing bout from Nashville, Tenn on June 21, 2025.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Linton Vassell vs. Valentin Moldavsky.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Mads Burnell defeats Clay Collard.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Brendan Loughnane defeats Justin Gonzales.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night: Clearwater - Gaskins vs. Guymon
programme.desc: BKFC Fight Night: Clearwater - Gaskins vs. Guymon.

programme.title: BKFC 41 Colorado: Perry vs. Rockhold
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, light heavyweight bout; Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings, women's flyweight championship bout. From 1stBank Center in Broomfield, Colo.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: From Nashville Municipal Auditorium in Nashville, Tenn.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: From Aug. 16, 2024 at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Hollywood in Hollywood, Fla. Featuring the 2024 playoffs - light heavyweight and lightweight divisions.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Mixed martial arts league where athletes compete in a regular season, postseason and championship.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Cub Hawkins and Ryan Jett fight for the Light Heavyweight Belt; Agnesa Kirakosian battles Shelby Cannon.

programme.title: BYB 26: Mile High Brawl
programme.desc: Professional bare-knuckle boxing from Denver, featuring Lorawnt-t Nelson vs. Tommy Turner.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From Seneca Allegany Resort and Casino in Salamanca, New York.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 3
programme.desc: From Gold Coast Sports & Leisure Center in Gold Coast, Australia.

programme.title: BKFC 22: Lombard vs. Hunt
programme.desc: Hector Lombard tries to defend the cruiserweight title against Lorenzo Hunt, while Dat Nguyen looks to take the lightweight title from Luis Palomino. From Nov. 19, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: BKFC 24
programme.desc: A championship bout between Lorenzo Hunt and Joe Riggs highlights the card.

programme.title: BKFC 25: Adams vs. Cleckler
programme.desc: Arnold Adams and Dillon Cleckler square up in a full night of bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 26
programme.desc: Featuring Elvin Brito vs. Luis Palomino for BKFC welterweight title and Francesco Ricchi vs. Uly Diaz for interim BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT: New Zealand: Full Circle Exploration
programme.desc: The DIRT crew comes full circle, exploring New Zealand’s breathtaking adventures and culinary experiences.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR's highly trained volunteers drop everything to rescue the injured in their community.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton rescuers Chris and Dee Hattaway's roles collide when treating a skier with a suspected spinal injury.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Ski A&E
programme.desc: Down a mountain is easy. Use skis or a snowboard. Getting up and around the area is a different matter.

programme.title: PaddyO Sucks at
programme.desc: Can veterans like Mirna Valerio and Brendan Leonard help PaddyO check “ultrarunning” off his bucket list?

programme.desc: Witness the evolution of freeskiing as the YETI Natural Selection Ski takes on the backcountry of Alaska.

programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to the Utah Desert to take on a variation of the Stone House Lands Bikepacking loop.
